form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 2070m after showing early speed at Gawler beaten 40 m by Hayoak (2:36.60) in NR up to 59 on March 30 at $26. At his previous start 7th (FT Fr2) over 2200m at Kapunda beaten 12 m by Daisy Bouchea (2:51.60) in NR up to 59 on March 8 at $19. Can improve enough to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 2070m after showing early speed at Gawler beaten 40 m by Hayoak (2:36.60) in NR up to 59 on March 30 at $26. At his previous start 7th (FT Fr2) over 2200m at Kapunda beaten 12 m by Daisy Bouchea (2:51.60) in NR up to 59 on March 8 at $19. Can improve enough to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to eventually be beaten 39.0m.

form.formComment: Good performance when beaten by 3 m finishing second behind Hayoak at Gawler over 2070m in a NR up to 59 on March 30 at $9.50. Then a handy effort when a close second after being driven well back, after a quick start, behind Alimonie at this track over 1800m in a NR up to 39 on April 4 at $7.60. Can continue the good form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance when beaten by 3 m finishing second behind Hayoak at Gawler over 2070m in a NR up to 59 on March 30 at $9.50. Then a handy effort when a close second after being driven well back, after a quick start, behind Alimonie at this track over 1800m in a NR up to 39 on April 4 at $7.60. Can continue the good form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position as the start was effected.
Broke gait shortly after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (FT Fr5) over 2160m at Victor Harbor, beaten 25 m by The Vicars Girl (2:45.50) in NR up to 59 on April 5 at $9.10. Before that, 4th (20m Fr2) over 2230m at this track beaten 15 m by Majestic Summer (2:55.40) in NR up to 46 on March 28 at $23. Can play a role again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (FT Fr5) over 2160m at Victor Harbor, beaten 25 m by The Vicars Girl (2:45.50) in NR up to 59 on April 5 at $9.10. Before that, 4th (20m Fr2) over 2230m at this track beaten 15 m by Majestic Summer (2:55.40) in NR up to 46 on March 28 at $23. Can play a role again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked when El Masses broke gait in advance of him near the 250m.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 5 m finishing fourth behind Janes Gem at this track over 2230m in a NR 41 to 59 on March 21 at $2.53. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Hayoak at Gawler over 2070m in a NR up to 59 on March 30 at $3.90. Strong claims from the front mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fair run when beaten by 5 m finishing fourth behind Janes Gem at this track over 2230m in a NR 41 to 59 on March 21 at $2.53. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Hayoak at Gawler over 2070m in a NR up to 59 on March 30 at $3.90. Strong claims from the front mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out under pressure in the final straight.
Galloped out as the strands were released on the third occasion.
Broke gait free of interference near the 500m.

form.formComment: Finished up last campaign with a win at this track, but hasn't been as effective this campaign with a first-up effort 6th (FT Fr2) over 2550m at Gawler well beaten by Aldebaran Dexta (3:14.80) in NR 60 or better on March 30 at $8. Then last outing surrendered the lead and finished 6th (Fr3) over 2160m after showing early speed at Victor Harbor beaten 30 m by Is That A Bid (2:43.80) in NR 60 or better on April 5 at $9.60. Could show more third up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished up last campaign with a win at this track, but hasn't been as effective this campaign with a first-up effort 6th (FT Fr2) over 2550m at Gawler well beaten by Aldebaran Dexta (3:14.80) in NR 60 or better on March 30 at $8. Then last outing surrendered the lead and finished 6th (Fr3) over 2160m after showing early speed at Victor Harbor beaten 30 m by Is That A Bid (2:43.80) in NR 60 or better on April 5 at $9.60. Could show more third up.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Majestic Summer at this track over 2230m in a NR up to 46 on March 28 at $8. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind The Vicars Girl at Victor Harbor over 2160m in a NR up to 59 on April 5 at $5.50. Solid claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Majestic Summer at this track over 2230m in a NR up to 46 on March 28 at $8. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind The Vicars Girl at Victor Harbor over 2160m in a NR up to 59 on April 5 at $5.50. Solid claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised the sprint lane to win the race.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 2070m after racing wide at Gawler was 2nd-4.3 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Hayoak (2:36.60) in NR up to 59 on March 30 at $15. At the run before 8th (FT Fr5) over 2230m at this track beaten 30 m by Stockman Peter (2:51.20) in NR 60 or better on March 21 at $51. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 2070m after racing wide at Gawler was 2nd-4.3 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Hayoak (2:36.60) in NR up to 59 on March 30 at $15. At the run before 8th (FT Fr5) over 2230m at this track beaten 30 m by Stockman Peter (2:51.20) in NR 60 or better on March 21 at $51. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind The Dark Thunder at Boort over 2612m in a No NR on March 1 at $3.10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second behind Maestro at Charlton over 2570m in a No NR on March 15 at $16. Close to a win and gets his chance here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into third behind The Dark Thunder at Boort over 2612m in a No NR on March 1 at $3.10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second behind Maestro at Charlton over 2570m in a No NR on March 15 at $16. Close to a win and gets his chance here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard through early and middle stages when leading the event.
Broke gait shortly after the start.
